title: The Future of U.S.-Russian Relations
summary: Dr. Thomas M. Nichols gave the keynote address at a symposium on U.S.-Russian relations which was sponsored by Tufts University on April 10, 2009.
body: Keynote Address Note Dr. Thomas M. Nichols gave the keynote address at a symposium on U.S.-Russian relations which was sponsored by Tufts University on April 10, 2009. The Tufts Daily published an account of Dr. Nichols' remarks in " Nichols Says U.S., Russia Have Reasons to Cooperate ," which was published on April 13, 2009.
